AGENT_RESPONSES.out_of_scope_topic: That question isn't something I can help with. I work with Earth observation data only — atmosphere, ocean, cryosphere, surface, and biosphere measurements. Try rephrasing around a measurable phenomenon (for example: air quality, methane, sea surface temperature, vegetation, precipitation) plus a location and time window.
AGENT_RESPONSES.out_of_scope_policy: I can show measured values from the catalog, but I can't make policy recommendations, predictions, or causal interpretations. If a data-derived chart or summary would help, I can produce one for a specific phenomenon, area, and time window.
AGENT_RESPONSES.greeting: I help you explore Earth observation data. Try asking about a specific phenomenon, location, and time window — for instance: 'Show NO2 levels over Los Angeles for January through June 2020'.
AGENT_RESPONSES.topic_required: What kind of Earth observation data are you interested in? Common topics include air quality, methane emissions, sea surface temperature, vegetation, and precipitation.
AGENT_RESPONSES.datetime_required: I need a time window before I can pull data. A range like 'summer 2022' or '2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31' works.
AGENT_RESPONSES.place_required: I need a location before I can pull data. A place name like 'Los Angeles', 'California', or 'Amazon basin' works.
AGENT_RESPONSES.datetime_and_place_required: I need both a location and a time window. Try something like 'Houston, TX, January 2023' and I can take it from there.
AGENT_RESPONSES.rate_limit: The catalog service is rate-limiting requests right now. Try again in a moment.
AGENT_RESPONSES.api_unavailable: The {service_name} service is unavailable at the moment. Try again shortly.
AGENT_RESPONSES.timeout: That request timed out. A smaller area or shorter time window should respond faster.

DATETIME_RESPONSES.success: Time window set to {datetime}. Confirm to continue.
DATETIME_RESPONSES.error_invalid: Couldn't parse '{error}' as a date. Use an ISO-8601 form such as '2023-01-01/2023-12-31'.
DATETIME_RESPONSES.error_future: The end date {end_date} is in the future. Use a window ending today or earlier.
DATETIME_RESPONSES.error_range: Start date must come before end date — please reverse them.

PLACE_RESPONSES.success: Location set to '{place}'. The map shows the resolved area; confirm to continue.
PLACE_RESPONSES.error_not_found: No location matched '{query}'. A more specific name (city, county, state) usually helps.
PLACE_RESPONSES.error_ambiguous: More than one place matched '{query}'. Did you mean: {options}?

COLLECTIONS_RESPONSES.success_multiple: {count} candidate datasets matched. Pick one to continue.
COLLECTIONS_RESPONSES.error_none: No datasets matched that topic plus area plus time window. Widen one of those filters — a broader date range, a larger area, or a related topic — and I can try again.
COLLECTIONS_RESPONSES.error_none_spatial: No datasets cover the location you chose. A different area or a broader topic may help.
COLLECTIONS_RESPONSES.error_none_temporal: No datasets cover the time window you chose. A different range may help.

SELECT_COLLECTION_RESPONSES.success_need_datetime_and_place: Selected '{title}'. To run the analysis I'll need a time window and a location.
SELECT_COLLECTION_RESPONSES.success_need_datetime: Selected '{title}'. To run the analysis I'll need a time window.
SELECT_COLLECTION_RESPONSES.success_need_place: Selected '{title}'. To run the analysis I'll need a location.
SELECT_COLLECTION_RESPONSES.pending_variable: '{title}' publishes multiple variables. Pick the one you want.
SELECT_COLLECTION_RESPONSES.error_invalid_collection: '{collection_id}' isn't one of the matched options. Pick from the listed candidates.
SELECT_COLLECTION_RESPONSES.error_invalid_variable: '{variable}' isn't a variable in this dataset.
SELECT_COLLECTION_RESPONSES.error_not_in_catalog: '{collection_id}' isn't in the catalog. Run a search first to see what's available.

STAC_RESPONSES.success_limited: Found {retrieved} of {matched} matching item{plural} (the rest were beyond the per-search limit).
STAC_RESPONSES.error_none: No items fall inside that area and time window. A broader area or wider window may help.
STAC_RESPONSES.error_no_bbox: I don't have a bounding box yet — confirm a location first.
STAC_RESPONSES.error_no_datetime: I don't have a time window yet — confirm a date range first.

STATS_RESPONSES.error_no_geometry: I don't have an area to compute statistics over — confirm a location first.
STATS_RESPONSES.error_no_items: There are no items to summarize. Either no data was found, or the topic and area don't intersect for the chosen window.
STATS_RESPONSES.error_partial: Computed statistics over {success_count} of {total_count} items; {failed_count} failed.

VIZ_RESPONSES.error_no_items: Nothing to visualize — no items have been computed yet.
